description: Recursive CTE for traversing a tree structure (categories with parent_id)
name: recursive_cte
query_sql:
-- @name GetCategoryTree
-- @returns :many
WITH RECURSIVE tree AS (SELECT id, name, parent_id FROM categories WHERE parent_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT c.id, c.name, c.parent_id FROM categories c JOIN tree t ON c.parent_id = t.id) SELECT * FROM tree
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE categories (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, parent_id INTEGER REFERENCES categories(id))
